subcodes.first_line: O Beloved of My Heart! Some time ago, a noble missive inscribed with the exalted signature was dispatched to His Honor, the distinguished presence of the Name of Bounty, upon whom rest manifold blessings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حبیب فوادی چندی قبل دستخط عالی که بجناب مخدوم مکرم حضرت اسم جود علیه منکل
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @soul; spirit after death, @limits of the intellect, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @unity in diversity
